desc.protected: Your traffic is routed through proxy.
desc.lost: Proxy is unresponsive. Waiting to restore...
desc.error: Node unreachable. Check details or select another server.

home.addManual: Click here to enter details manually

add.descEdit: Change your server details. Saving will restart connection.
add.clipboardError: Could not read clipboard. Paste manually.
add.protocolWarning: Make sure you selected the correct proxy protocols (HTTP(S) or SOCKS5), as specified by your provider
add.protocolSelectionDesc: All imported proxies will be added with the selected protocol. If individual proxies use different protocols, you'll need to change them manually after import.
add.vpnKeepTypes: VPN protocols are auto-detected from links
add.trojanTlsHint: Trojan uses TLS; SNI and certificate options are stored in the profile extra fields.
add.vpnTransportParamsHint: For the selected network, set parameters as in your subscription. The server may only accept one transport or security — that is not a client bug.
add.vpnTcpLinkHint: A link with type=tcp targets TCP; the same address may not offer WebSocket or gRPC. Providers usually give a separate link or parameters for another transport.
add.vpnNetworkChangedWarning: You changed the network from the imported profile. Connection may fail until path/host (and other fields) match this transport in your subscription. Changing the dropdown alone is not enough if the node does not listen on that protocol.

autostart.title: Run at startup
autostart.desc: Automatically open application when PC boots.

killswitch.title: Enable Kill Switch
killswitch.desc: Instantly cut internet connection if proxy goes down.

adblock.title: Ad Blocker
adblock.desc: Automatically block ads and trackers when connected through proxy.

dns.title: DNS Servers
dns.desc: Choose a DNS provider or enter custom DNS servers separated by commas.

lan_listen.toggle_desc: Allow other devices on your local network to connect to this proxy. Use only on trusted networks.
lan_listen.port_desc: Empty or 0 means auto. A fixed port is convenient for connecting other devices.
lan_listen.addr_auto: The port will be selected automatically after connection.
lan_listen.addr_unknown: Could not determine IP. Use this PC's local network IP and port {{port}}.
lan_listen.port_invalid: Port must be a number from 1 to 65535, or empty/0 (auto).

quic.title: QUIC (UDP/443)
quic.desc: On: better speed and compatibility for YouTube/Google. Off: compatibility mode for networks where QUIC is unstable.

export_import.title: Export / Import Configurations
export_import.desc: Save config to a secure file. It will be encrypted with your personal password.

modal.desc_export: Create a password. You will need it to load this config on another device.
modal.desc_import: Enter the password you used to save this file.

notify.decrypt_success: Secure configuration successfully decrypted and applied!
notify.decrypt_error: Error: Incorrect password or damaged file.

modes.global_desc: All system traffic is routed through the selected proxy server.
modes.smart_desc: Optional mode: proxy is active only for blocked resources. If the online list is unavailable, a local fallback is used without breaking the connection.

domains.title: Exception Sites (Domains)
domains.desc: Sites from this list will always connect directly, without a proxy. Changes apply instantly.
domains.tooltip: If the list contains a general mask (e.g., .ru) and a specific domain (e.g., avito.ru), the specific domain will be proxied (acting as an exception to the exclusion rule).

apps.title: Exception Applications
apps.desc1: Traffic from these apps will connect directly.
apps.desc2: Child processes (e.g., Steam games) will also bypass the proxy.
apps.popular: Popular programs to bypass the proxy:

proxyList.title: Saved Profiles
proxyList.confirmDeleteSubscription: Delete subscription "{{name}}" and all its servers from the list?
proxyList.subRefreshHint: If the subscription does not work, use the refresh button.
proxyList.noResults: No proxies found matching your criteria.

msg.not_in_whitelist: ) not in whitelist. Routing through proxy.

buy.title: Buy Proxies
buy.desc: Reliable IPv4 and IPv6 proxies for any tasks from our partners

proxy_seller.discount_desc: Register on Proxy-Seller using the link below to get a discount on proxies.

proxy6.discount_desc: Register on PROXY6.net using the link below to get a 5% discount on proxies.

proxy_market.discount_desc: Register on proxy market using the link below to get a 5% discount on proxies.

tunnel.adminMessage: Tunnel mode needs administrator privileges for the virtual network adapter. Click the button below and approve the UAC prompt — the app will restart elevated.
